utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look Julio , someone left their book here .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh yeah , what are you reading ?

utterances.speaker: Julio
utterances.text: Flowers of Evil , by Beaudalire . Have you read it ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Have I read it ? No , are you enjoying it ?

utterances.speaker: Julio
utterances.text: I thought I would , but the translation no good .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Your a poet and do not know it .

utterances.speaker: Julio
utterances.text: Actually I ah , I am a poet .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , then you do know it . So um what kind of things do you write about ?

utterances.speaker: Julio
utterances.text: Things that move me . The , the shadow of a tree , a child laughing , or this lip .

utterances.speaker: Julio
utterances.text: I can write an epic poem about this lip .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: How would that go ? Well , it did not rhyme , but I liked it .
